description: A Bricks element as stored in any content area (header, content, footer)

name.description: Element type (matches the element schema filename, e.g. "button", "heading")

parent.description: Parent element ID, or 0 for root-level elements

children.description: Ordered array of child element IDs

settings._note: Dynamic map of all settings for this element or class. Keys are element-specific control names (e.g. `text`, `style`) or inherited CSS setting keys, optionally suffixed with a breakpoint and/or pseudo-class using colon syntax (e.g. `_typography:tablet_portrait:hover`). See the individual element schemas for available control keys.

selectors.description: Custom CSS selectors with scoped settings (since Bricks 2.0)

items.description: Custom CSS selector on an element or global class (since Bricks 2.0). Allows scoping control settings to arbitrary CSS selectors.

id.description: Unique identifier for this selector entry

settings.description: Control settings scoped to this selector (same shape as element settings)
settings._note: Dynamic map of all settings for this element or class. Keys are element-specific control names (e.g. `text`, `style`) or inherited CSS setting keys, optionally suffixed with a breakpoint and/or pseudo-class using colon syntax (e.g. `_typography:tablet_portrait:hover`). See the individual element schemas for available control keys.

label.description: Optional display label for this selector in the builder UI
Optional custom label assigned by the user

themeStyles.description: Theme style overrides applied to this element
